reason: OpenAI ops issue confirmed not code regression: 9 prior nights green; e2e-real-ai-smoke (OpenRouter gemini-2.5-flash) was green at 08:22 UTC same moment as the failure; public failures are 'Error communicating with AI service' on live prod and evolution failures are run-pipeline+iterative-editing runs ending status=failed (exact match for saved-memory project_evolution_e2e_openai_quota.md ops pattern); release PR CI uses local build with E2E_TEST_MODE mocking AI so promotion is decoupled from OpenAI quota.
